title: Vidrohi
subTitle: A law-abiding police officer gets trapped in the web of a cunning ploy devised by two criminals. After receiving a death sentence, he escapes prison to avenge the injustice.

title: Param Dharam
subTitle: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

title: Shiv Ganga
subTitle: When Kamdev attempts to provoke feelings of lust in Lord Shiva with the arrow of love, he faces a wrath that threatens his life.

title: Teri Payal Mere Geet
subTitle: Premi makes a living by selling poems to Benni and falls in love with a courtesan, Laila Jaan. However, he leaves her after finding the truth about her but tries to get back with her.

title: Dil Tera Aashiq
subTitle: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

title: Nikaah
subTitle: Haider falls for Nilofar but she gets married to Wasim. However, things take a turn when Wasim divorces Nilofar and Haider returns in her life.

title: Kaash
subTitle: Ritesh, a movie star, lives a lavish lifestyle with his wife and child. However, a string of box office failures and financial losses cause him to descend into alcoholism.

title: Mehndi
subTitle: Newly-wed Pooja is left shocked when her in-laws and her husband start ill-treating her. Unable to bear the mistreatment, she decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Bandit Queen
subTitle: Phoolan Devi, who belongs to a lower caste, faces sexual abuse and discrimination in society. A turn of events leads to her becoming the revered leader of a gang.

subTitle: Mala, a poor girl, marries the son of her father's employer. Things, however, take a turn for the worse when her father-in-law dies and his ruthless children show their true colours.

title: Santosh
subTitle: A rich woman marries a poor man but after having a child, she abandons them for her old life and remarries into wealth. Years later, her two sons from different worlds clash, their fates entwined by their mother's past decisions.

title: Nirbhay
subTitle: An innocent man faces wrongful imprisonment for murder, but years later uncovers a shocking conspiracy. Subsequently, determined to avenge his past, he embarks on a relentless quest for vengeance.

title: Itihaas
subTitle: Joginder, a police officer, and his family are put in danger when the notorious underworld kingpin, Alexander, is arrested. Upon his release, he vows revenge on those who jailed him.

title: Zakhm
subTitle: A boy, born into a family of varying religions, finds himself embroiled in communal riots. Soon, his mother's death becomes an issue raised to fulfil political agendas.
